news.title:
Bank of Baroda received INR 806.2 crore tax demand from FAU on March 30, 2026.
Disclosure made under LODR guidelines as per exchange filing by the Bank.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda received INR 806.2 crore tax demand from FAU on March 30, 2026.
Disclosure made under LODR guidelines as per exchange filing by the Bank.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda resolved the MP govt fund transfer issue swiftly.
The temporary debarment was lifted within 24 hours with no operational impact.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda resolved the MP govt fund transfer issue swiftly.
The temporary debarment was lifted within 24 hours with no operational impact.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda infused ₹500 Cr into subsidiary BOB Securities & Giltedge Ltd.
The move aligns with BoB's focus on strengthening its subsidiaries per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda infused ₹500 Cr into subsidiary BOB Securities & Giltedge Ltd.
The move aligns with BoB's focus on strengthening its subsidiaries per SEBI norms.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda received a ₹457.3 crore tax demand notice for AY 2019-20.
The bank is appealing the order and expects no financial impact currently.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda received a ₹457.3 crore tax demand notice for AY 2019-20.
The bank is appealing the order and expects no financial impact currently.

news.title:
Madhya Pradesh bans Bank of Baroda over Rs 1,751 crore CM Kisan Yojana fund lapse.
The order was revoked within 24 hours due to a wrong treasury head for deposit.
news.summary:
Madhya Pradesh bans Bank of Baroda over Rs 1,751 crore CM Kisan Yojana fund lapse.
The order was revoked within 24 hours due to a wrong treasury head for deposit.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda received GBP 75M from its UK subsidiary on 27.03.2026.
The transaction is a capital reduction repatriation per SEBI transparency rules.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda received GBP 75M from its UK subsidiary on 27.03.2026.
The transaction is a capital reduction repatriation per SEBI transparency rules.

news.title:
Bank stocks fell 2%, ending a 2-day rise; Canara Bank dropped 4%.
HDFC Bank fell 2% amid reports of leadership disputes; PSU Bank index dropped 3%.
news.summary:
Bank stocks fell 2%, ending a 2-day rise; Canara Bank dropped 4%.
HDFC Bank fell 2% amid reports of leadership disputes; PSU Bank index dropped 3%.

news.title:
Anil Ambani seeks SBI & BoB-led panel for structured debt resolution citing legal precedents and repayment history.
Ambani proposes a meeting to advance discussions, referencing past insolvency resolutions and seeking Finance Minister's support.
news.summary:
Anil Ambani seeks SBI & BoB-led panel for structured debt resolution citing legal precedents and repayment history.
Ambani proposes a meeting to advance discussions, referencing past insolvency resolutions and seeking Finance Minister's support.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda ordered to pay Rs 3.28L for failing to reverse a failed Rs 10K ATM withdrawal.
The issue persisted for nearly nine years before a Surat consumer court's ruling.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda ordered to pay Rs 3.28L for failing to reverse a failed Rs 10K ATM withdrawal.
The issue persisted for nearly nine years before a Surat consumer court's ruling.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary, BOB Securities & Giltedge Ltd.
The subsidiary will undertake Standalone Primary Dealership business per RBI guidelines.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary, BOB Securities & Giltedge Ltd.
The subsidiary will undertake Standalone Primary Dealership business per RBI guidelines.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda fined Rs. 1 lakh by RBI for note shortage in remittance.
Penalty to impact profit & loss; disclosure submitted to stock exchanges.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda fined Rs. 1 lakh by RBI for note shortage in remittance.
Penalty to impact profit & loss; disclosure submitted to stock exchanges.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda secures $500M via 5-year syndicated loan through IFSC unit in GIFT City.
This marks its return to the global syndicated loan market after a year.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda secures $500M via 5-year syndicated loan through IFSC unit in GIFT City.
This marks its return to the global syndicated loan market after a year.

news.title:
Economists foresee limited impact of imported inflation on CPI due to fiscal measures but WPI may rise from fuel price hikes.
Bank of Baroda expects 150 basis points WPI jump if fuel prices rise; IDFC First Bank highlights CPI's low imported component at 6.84%.
news.summary:
Economists foresee limited impact of imported inflation on CPI due to fiscal measures but WPI may rise from fuel price hikes.
Bank of Baroda expects 150 basis points WPI jump if fuel prices rise; IDFC First Bank highlights CPI's low imported component at 6.84%.

news.title:
BoB predicts rupee may trade below 92/$ if US-Israel war prolongs.
Rising oil prices may push inflation by 0.2-0.4%, impacting fiscal deficit.
news.summary:
BoB predicts rupee may trade below 92/$ if US-Israel war prolongs.
Rising oil prices may push inflation by 0.2-0.4%, impacting fiscal deficit.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda report indicates oil surge may raise WPI by 1%.
Oil rise could widen CAD, impacting economic metrics significantly.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda report indicates oil surge may raise WPI by 1%.
Oil rise could widen CAD, impacting economic metrics significantly.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda raised Rs 10,000 crore via Series I green infra bonds.
The 7-year bond saw bids worth Rs 16,415 crore on NSE platform.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda raised Rs 10,000 crore via Series I green infra bonds.
The 7-year bond saw bids worth Rs 16,415 crore on NSE platform.

news.title: Bank of Baroda issues and allocates bonds valued at ₹100 billion.
news.summary: Bank of Baroda issues and allocates bonds valued at ₹100 billion.

news.title:
Sidbi canceled its ₹8,000 crore bond issue due to high yield bids.
Investor bids totaled ₹5,079 crore, with yields at 7.28%-7.44%.
news.summary:
Sidbi canceled its ₹8,000 crore bond issue due to high yield bids.
Investor bids totaled ₹5,079 crore, with yields at 7.28%-7.44%.

news.title:
Bank Nifty falls 2% as Middle East conflict drives oil surge; PSU banks lead losses.
Rupee hits a record low of 92.17; crude rise impacts CAD, fiscal deficit, inflation for India.
news.summary:
Bank Nifty falls 2% as Middle East conflict drives oil surge; PSU banks lead losses.
Rupee hits a record low of 92.17; crude rise impacts CAD, fiscal deficit, inflation for India.

news.title:
SC rules unsuccessful bidders can't challenge lenders' decisions in IBC matters, citing value erosion and delays.
CoC approved SEML's Rs 1,950 crore bid for SKS Power; appeals by Torrent, Jindal Power dismissed.
news.summary:
SC rules unsuccessful bidders can't challenge lenders' decisions in IBC matters, citing value erosion and delays.
CoC approved SEML's Rs 1,950 crore bid for SKS Power; appeals by Torrent, Jindal Power dismissed.
